━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Application Metrics:
  • Static Pages: 54
  • API Routes: 172
  • Dependencies: 1437 packages
  • Vulnerabilities: 0
  • Next.js: 14.2.35
  • Node.js: 20 LTS
  • PostgreSQL: 15

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
                  ✅ DEPLOYMENT CONFIGURATION READY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Infrastructure:
  • Docker: Multi-stage build configured
  • Docker Compose: 4 services orchestrated
  • Nginx: Reverse proxy with SSL/HTTP2
  • SSL/HTTPS: Let's Encrypt auto-renewal
  • Database: PostgreSQL with health checks
  • Monitoring: Health endpoints configured

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
                      🚀 QUICK DEPLOYMENT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

On your production server:

  cd /var/www
  git clone https://github.com/adrianstanca1/cortexbuild-pro.git
  cd cortexbuild-pro/deployment
  ./deploy-production.sh

Deployment Time: 10-15 minutes

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
                      📋 PREREQUISITES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Required:
  ✅ Ubuntu 20.04+ VPS (2GB RAM, 2 CPU cores min)
  ✅ Domain cortexbuildpro.com DNS configured
  ✅ SSH access with sudo privileges
  ✅ Docker installed (or script can install)
  ✅ Ports 22, 80, 443 open

DNS Configuration:
  A    cortexbuildpro.com      → YOUR_SERVER_IP
  A    www                      → YOUR_SERVER_IP

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
                      🎯 CORE FEATURES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Main Modules (10):
  ✅ Projects Management - Complete lifecycle
  ✅ Tasks - List, Kanban, Gantt views
  ✅ RFIs - Request for Information
  ✅ Submittals - Document workflows
  ✅ Time Tracking - Labor hours
  ✅ Budget Management - Cost tracking
  ✅ Safety Management - Incidents & metrics
  ✅ Daily Reports - Site diary
  ✅ Documents - File management
  ✅ Team Management - RBAC

Advanced Features:
  ✅ Real-time Collaboration (WebSocket)
  ✅ Admin Console - Multi-org management
  ✅ API Management - Health monitoring
  ✅ Audit Logging - Activity tracking
  ✅ Analytics - Charts & insights

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
                      🔒 SECURITY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Security Measures:
  ✅ HTTPS/SSL with Let's Encrypt
  ✅ Secure NEXTAUTH_SECRET generated
  ✅ JWT authentication
  ✅ Prisma ORM (SQL injection protection)
  ✅ Environment variable isolation
  ✅ Docker container isolation
  ✅ 0 known vulnerabilities

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
                  📱 POST-DEPLOYMENT STEPS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. Access Application:
   → https://www.cortexbuildpro.com

2. Create Admin Account:
   → Click "Sign Up"
   → First user becomes admin automatically

3. Configure Platform:
   → Navigate to /admin
   → Set organization settings
   → Configure optional services (S3, SendGrid, etc.)

4. Setup Monitoring:
   → Configure automated backups
   → Review health endpoints
   → Setup log monitoring

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
                    📞 SUPPORT & RESOURCES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Documentation:
  • START_HERE.md - Quick start guide
  • DEPLOY_TO_CORTEXBUILDPRO.md - Full deployment guide
  • QUICK_REFERENCE.md - Command reference
  • README.md - Main documentation

Common Commands:
  docker compose up -d         # Start services
  docker compose logs -f app   # View logs
  docker compose ps            # Check status
  ./backup.sh                  # Backup database

Health Check:
  curl https://www.cortexbuildpro.com/api/auth/providers

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
